---
title: "celebrity-association-questionnaire-analysis-4.22"
author: "Erin Crandell"
date: "2026-04-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

options(scipen = 999)

d_celebrityassociation <- read_csv('../data/celebrity-association-questionnaire-responses-4.26.csv')

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

#H1 Celebrity association is associated with purchase intention


```
